title: The Four Bad Boys and Me
original_title: The Four Bad Boys and Me
overview: A nerdy, weird, and forever-alone nobody's supposedly 'peaceful' life undergoes a chaotic change when she unexpectedly gets tangled with a group of four notorious bad boys.
